queries.question: Show me the services that every clinic provides.
queries.sql: SELECT Services.service_name  from Clinics_Services join Services on Clinics_Services.service_id = Services.service_id join Clinics on Clinics_Services.clinic_id = Clinics.clinic_id   GROUP BY Clinics_Services.service_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Clinics_Services.clinic_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Clinics)

queries.question: Show me the services that every clinic provides.
queries.sql: select clinics.name , services.service_name from Clinics_Services join Services on Clinics_Services.service_id = Services.service_id join Clinics on Clinics_Services.clinic_id = Clinics.clinic_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?service_name WHERE {
  ?clinics_services a :Clinics_Services .
  ?services a :Services .
  ?clinics_services p:hasServices ?services .
  ?clinics a :Clinics .
  ?clinics_services p:hasClinics ?clinics .
  ?clinics p:name ?name .
  ?services p:service_name ?service_name .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me the services that every clinic provides.
